content: Curiosity-driven intrinsic reward modules (ICM/RND) can be repurposed as a dynamic gating mechanism for SOTA active learning agent memory, where intrinsic prediction error automatically prioritizes storage of high-uncertainty, information-rich episodic memories instead of relying on hand-designed active selection criteria. This reframes intrinsic curiosity not just as exploration drive, but as a built-in uncertainty filter for scalable agent memory.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
